# PlayToneAction.Tone.softPause

**Case**

A person entered a soft pause.

## Declaration

```swift
case softPause
```

## Discussion

A comma (,) indicates a soft pause. When a person enters a soft pause, the system waits a few seconds before it dials additional digits.

## Keypad tones

- **PlayToneAction.Tone.hardPause**: A person entered a hard pause.
- **PlayToneAction.Tone.single**: A person entered a digit.

items.description: A person entered a hard pause.
